translations.it: Ha il profumo della mia infanzia.
translations.yue: 聞起嚟有我童年嘅味道。
translations.vi: Mùi này giống tuổi thơ của tôi.
translations.hi: इसमें मेरे बचपन की खुशबू है।
translations.el: Μυρίζει σαν την παιδική μου ηλικία.
translations.ja: 子どもの頃の匂いがする。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative pronoun functioning as the sentence subject (3rd person singular neuter); nominative.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present); selects a PP with 'nach' to indicate what something smells like.
Preposition governing the dative; with 'riechen' expresses resemblance/source of smell; head of the PP.
Possessive determiner (1st person singular) agreeing with 'Kindheit' in case (dative), number (singular), and gender (feminine).
Common noun (feminine); object of the preposition 'nach' in the dative; complements the PP.

sentences.target: In meiner Kindheit spielte ich draußen.

translations.de: In meiner Kindheit spielte ich draußen.
translations.en: In my childhood, I played outside.
translations.fr: Quand j'étais enfant, je jouais dehors.
translations.yue: 細個嗰陣我成日喺出面玩。
translations.ru: В детстве я часто играл на улице.
translations.pt: Quando eu era criança, brincava na rua.
translations.vi: Hồi nhỏ tôi hay chơi ngoài trời.
translations.ar: في طفولتي كنت ألعب في الخارج.
translations.hi: बचपन में मैं बाहर खेलता था।
translations.pl: W dzieciństwie bawiłem się na dworze.
translations.id: Waktu kecil, aku main di luar.
translations.ro: Când eram mic, mă jucam afară.
translations.cs: Jako dítě jsem si hrál venku.
translations.ja: 子どもの頃は外で遊んでいた。

tokens.explanation: Preposition governing the dative when indicating location/time; heads the temporal PP placed in the forefield.
Possessive determiner agreeing with 'Kindheit' (dative feminine singular) inside the PP.
Common noun (feminine); object of 'in' in the dative; temporal setting.
Finite main verb (1st person singular, simple past); appears in V2 position due to the fronted PP.
Personal pronoun (1st person singular) in nominative; subject placed after the finite verb due to V2 word order.
Adverb of place; modifies the verb phrase and indicates location.

sentences.target: Wir reden oft über deine Kindheit.

translations.de: Wir reden oft über deine Kindheit.
translations.en: We often talk about your childhood.
translations.es: Hablamos a menudo de tu infancia.
translations.fr: On parle souvent de ton enfance.
translations.ko: 우리는 네 어린 시절에 대해 자주 이야기해.
translations.ru: Мы часто говорим о твоём детстве.
translations.he: אנחנו מדברים הרבה על הילדות שלך.
translations.tr: Senin çocukluğun hakkında sık sık konuşuyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng ta thường nói về tuổi thơ của bạn.
translations.ar: نحن غالبًا ما نتحدث عن طفولتك.
translations.nl: We praten vaak over jouw jeugd.
translations.uk: Ми часто говоримо про твоє дитинство.
translations.hi: हम अक्सर तुम्हारे बचपन के बारे में बात करते हैं।
translations.el: Μιλάμε συχνά για την παιδική σου ηλικία.
translations.nb: Vi snakker ofte om barndommen din.
translations.sv: Vi pratar ofta om din barndom.
translations.da: Vi taler ofte om din barndom.
translations.ja: あなたの子どもの頃の話をよくする。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (1st person plural) in nominative; subject.
Finite main verb (1st person plural, present); commonly takes 'über' + accusative to mark the topic.
Adverb of frequency; modifies the predicate.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces the topic PP.
Possessive determiner (2nd person singular) agreeing with 'Kindheit' in accusative feminine singular.
Common noun (feminine); object of 'über' in the accusative; topic of conversation.

sentences.target: Sie bewahrt Kisten aus ihrer Kindheit auf.
sentences.reading: /ziː bəˈvaːʁt ˈkɪstn̩ aʊ̯s ˈiːʁɐ ˈkɪnthait aʊ̯f/

translations.de: Sie bewahrt Kisten aus ihrer Kindheit auf.
translations.ipa: /ziː bəˈvaːʁt ˈkɪstn̩ aʊ̯s ˈiːʁɐ ˈkɪnthait aʊ̯f/
translations.en: She keeps boxes from her childhood.
translations.es: Ella guarda cajas de su infancia.
translations.fr: Elle garde des boîtes de son enfance.
translations.it: Lei conserva scatole della sua infanzia.
translations.ko: 그녀는 어린 시절의 상자들을 간직하고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 她保留着童年时的箱子。
translations.yue: 佢留住佢細個嗰陣嘅啲箱。
translations.ru: Она хранит коробки из своего детства.
translations.pt: Ela guarda caixas da sua infância.
translations.vi: Cô ấy giữ những chiếc hộp từ thời thơ ấu.
translations.nl: Ze bewaart dozen uit haar jeugd.
translations.uk: Вона зберігає коробки зі свого дитинства.
translations.hi: वह अपने बचपन के डिब्बे संभालकर रखती है।
translations.pl: Ona trzyma pudełka ze swojego dzieciństwa.
translations.el: Κρατά κουτιά από την παιδική της ηλικία.
translations.nb: Hun sparer på esker fra barndommen sin.
translations.id: Dia menyimpan kotak-kotak dari masa kecilnya.
translations.sv: Hon sparar lådor från sin barndom.
translations.ro: Ea păstrează cutii din copilăria ei.
translations.da: Hun gemmer kasser fra sin barndom.
translations.ja: 彼女は子どもの頃の箱を取ってある。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (3rd person singular feminine) in nominative; subject.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present) from the separable verb 'aufbewahren'; verb-second (V2); its particle 'auf' appears clause-finally.
Common noun (plural, accusative); direct object of the verb; items being stored.
Preposition governing the dative; heads a PP modifying 'Kisten' to indicate origin/provenance.
Possessive determiner (3rd person singular) agreeing with 'Kindheit' in dative feminine singular within the PP.
Common noun (feminine); object of 'aus' in the dative; complements the NP-internal PP modifying 'Kisten'.
Separable verbal particle belonging to 'aufbewahren'; appears at clause end in main clauses.
